title: Memorales PvP Pack For Crystal,Mace And Sword
description: Optimized All-in-one Crystal,Mace and Sword PvP Pack With Many Features!
body:
#  **Memorales PvP**

**This PvP Pack Includes:**

### **Custom Sword Textures!** ⚔️

![Custom Sword Textures!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63733c33ea353844dd969dbdf1ab478f5fffc871.png)

### **Optimized Crystal Design** 💎

![Optimized Crystal Design!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d338111c89aa46176d29216fdaa4b30c2c4813b6.png)

### **Custom 1 Pixel Short Sword Design** 👌

![Custom Sword Design!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3423826432f4d6fc9e3a210b429c8a61af9ff23.png)

### **Small Optimized Mace Design** 👀

![Small Optimized Mace Design!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ae7ac06c2cef72cdcaca8b10b3bb74149c5b1aa_0.webp)

### **Small Totem + Small Shield** 🛡️

![Small Totem + Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5806a88fa144febe54eaa281c0d0bdc66f5b9a18_0.webp)

### **Small Totem Pop** 💥

![Small Totem Pop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4454e8bfa3a0ce593c35eaf0a2bb453fd6977d31.png)

### **Optimized/Reduced Fire Effect**🔥
![Optimized Fire Effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b63ae594000ba6bc14770f9f24d3f50cb6a0ad5_0.webp)

**Customizable Blue Gui** 💙

**Optimized Firework Effect** 🎇

**Smooth Armor Design** 🪖

**Shader-Like Look With Better Saturation** ☀️

**Full Brightness/Night Vision** 💡

**And Many More Optimized Items!**
